relatedProjects.name: Since AI
relatedProjects.tagline: AI community and innovation platform connecting builders, companies, research, and capital
relatedProjects.description: Execution-focused AI community and innovation platform connecting builders, companies, research, and capital.
relatedProjects.longDescription: Since AI is an AI community and innovation platform focused on connecting builders, companies, research institutions, and capital. Through strategic partnerships with technology companies and practical program design, Since AI drives community engagement and applied AI development.

relatedProjects.name: Attractor
relatedProjects.tagline: Technology consultancy building production-grade software, automation, and AI systems
relatedProjects.description: Technology consultancy building production-grade software, automation, and AI systems.
relatedProjects.longDescription: Attractor is a technology consultancy building production-grade software, applied AI, and automation systems. Operating at the intersection of technical delivery and commercial execution, helping teams turn goals into shipped outcomes through practical AI integration and solution architecture.
